title: Post-078 Validation-Surface Decomposition Readiness Verdict
objective: Record the post-publication disjoint-scope readiness verdict after the Packet 075 validation-surface decomposition artifact is published and `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean, without opening simultaneous multi-worker execution or migration.
verdict_summary: The active operations-web browser validation surface is no longer a single shared tracked smoke file. Packet 078 published separate apparatus, relay, and static-surfaces browser-smoke files and restored `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity. This removes the specific Packet 070 blocking fact that apparatus and relay validation necessarily converged on one tracked smoke file, but it does not by itself open simultaneous multi-worker execution.
readiness_upgrade: The lane has proven one full validation-surface decomposition cycle through one-worker host execution, workstation mirror validation, publication, and clean host reconciliation.
A later packet may now plan truly disjoint apparatus and relay ownership using separate tracked validation files.

Any actual simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution remains closed until a later explicit readiness and execution packet defines non-overlap, conflict rules, ownership, validation, and publication cadence.
evidence: Packet 076 validated the artifact with matching SHA-256 `aa258683ae8451a61322894b8c8995a2710c8a68f05a6cf5701c05401450b84a`, diff hygiene, typecheck, Next build, and focused Playwright passing.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 080 - Packet 078 And Packet 079 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
sql_permission_note: This verdict packet authorizes no database writes and no source/test execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, second-worker execution, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 079 records that the validation-surface decomposition is published and conditionally ready for later disjoint-scope execution planning, but simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution remains closed until a later explicit packet opens it.
